dates.summary: Anthropic shipped Claude Opus 4.7, positioning it as its newest flagship model with improved long-running task performance, instruction following, self-verification, and computer-use workflows, alongside a tokenizer update that can increase token counts by roughly 1.0–1.35x depending on content. Google expanded AI Mode into Chrome, a strategic move to embed AI-native web exploration directly into the browser, while OpenAI broadened Codex on macOS and Windows with computer use, browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins. ByteDance Seed also unveiled Seed 2.0 artifacts including Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling continued competition in multimodal and real-time voice systems.
